reviews.review_description: It's fun engaging it just need a graphic overhaul like the engine look fake it'll look like 3D Don't look realistic The cars on the outside looks good The characters need upgraded they neck look twisted with a turn their head in the form so you can upgrade the graphics on the game they all look way better if you can get the closest two realistic that you can it'll make the game more funner The characters need upgraded they buy you the twisted in deformed and the zombie attack need to be upgraded it looks cheesy and cheap I thought going to be at the bottom shooting a zombie as well and they don't look scary or realistic look kind of cartoonish the way the wave of zombies come let me a little upgrade too they don't feel scary or realistic to the point I don't feel like a threat just the characters and an animal the upgraded an environment and you got something going here The more realistic it looks the more realistic it feels keep up the good work dives you got something going here so better it look the better it is

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed feedback! Border Patrol is in Early Access, and we’re actively improving character models, animations, enemies, and overall realism. Your input helps us prioritize visual upgrades as development continues. We appreciate the support and are working to make each update better.
